scripts.lint: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Push-Location server; ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m ruff check app tests; Pop-Location; Push-Location client; npm run lint; Pop-Location"
scripts.test: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Push-Location server; ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest -q; Pop-Location; Push-Location client; npm run test; Pop-Location"
scripts.typecheck: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Push-Location client; npm run typecheck; Pop-Location"
scripts.build: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Push-Location client; npm run build; Pop-Location"
scripts.test:e2e: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Push-Location client; npm run playwright:test; Pop-Location"
